Class Column

java.lang.Object
domain.Column
public class Column extends Object
Represents a column in a table, including its name, type, blank-value policy, and default value.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Column(String name)
    Constructs a new Column with the given name.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String

    Returns the default value for this column.

    Returns the name of this column.

    Returns the type of this column.
    boolean
    isBlanksAllowed()
    Returns whether blank values are allowed in this column.

    setBlanksAllowed(boolean allowBlanks)
    Sets whether blank values are allowed in this column.

    Sets the default value for this column.

  • Constructor Details

    • Column

      public Column(String name)
      Constructs a new Column with the given name. The initial type is ColumnType.STRING.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the column, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the name is null

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of this column.
      Returns:
      the column name

    • setName

      public void setName(String newName)
      Sets the name of this column.
      Parameters:
      newName - the new name to set, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if newName is null

    • getType

      public ColumnType getType()
      Returns the type of this column.
      Returns:
      the column type

    • setType

      public void setType(ColumnType type)
      Sets the type of this column.
      Parameters:
      type - the new column type, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if type is null

    • isBlanksAllowed

      public boolean isBlanksAllowed()
      Returns whether blank values are allowed in this column.
      Returns:
      true if blanks are allowed; false otherwise

    • setBlanksAllowed

      public void setBlanksAllowed(boolean allowBlanks)
      Sets whether blank values are allowed in this column.
      Parameters:
      allowBlanks - true to allow blanks; false to disallow

    • getDefaultValue

      public String getDefaultValue()
      Returns the default value for this column.
      Returns:
      the default value

    • setDefaultValue

      public void setDefaultValue(String defaultValue)
      Sets the default value for this column.
      Parameters:
      defaultValue - the default value to set, must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if defaultValue is null
